output_dir.label: Output Directory
output_dir.toolTip: Directory where STL and 3MF files will be saved

scale.label: Scale Factor
scale.toolTip: Scale factor (angstroms → mm). 10.0 gives a typical desk model.

generate_3mf.label: Also generate 3MF (colored)
generate_3mf.toolTip: Generate a colored 3MF file in addition to individual STL files
